products.title: Curtains
products.description: High durability and long-lasting performance are essential for commercial carpets due to heavy daily foot traffic. Choosing premium-quality carpeting ensures lasting comfort, resilience, and appearance, making it a smart long-term investment for your space.

history.heading: History Of Wallpapers
history.short: Wallpapers transform walls with rich patterns, textures, and timeless decorative appeal.
history.full: Wallpapers have long been a statement element in interior décor, enhancing spaces with pattern, depth, and character. From classic artistic motifs to modern textured finishes, today’s wallpapers offer an elegant way to personalize walls and elevate the ambiance of any room.

sideBySide.title: Modern Wallpaper Designs
sideBySide.description: Modern wallpapers feature clean designs and soft textures that perfectly suit today’s stylish interiors.

sideBySide.title: Classic Wallpaper Designs
sideBySide.description: Classic wallpapers include floral, damask, and ornamental styles that bring timeless charm to living spaces.

types.title: Paper Wallpaper
types.description: Decorative patterns printed on a paper base, offering a classic look ideal for low-moisture interior spaces.

types.title: Vinyl-Coated (Paper-Backed)
types.description: Paper-based wallpaper finished with a protective vinyl coating for added durability and easy maintenance.

types.title: Non-Woven Wallpaper
types.description: Made from blended natural and synthetic fibers, providing a breathable, tear-resistant, and refined textured finish.

types.title: Solid Vinyl Wallpaper
types.description: Fully vinyl construction that delivers superior strength, washability, and long-lasting performance in busy areas.

types.title: PVC / Coated Vinyl Wallpaper
types.description: Moisture-resistant and budget-friendly wallpaper with a protective coating, suitable for kitchens and humid spaces.

types.title: Fabric Wallpaper
types.description: Luxurious textile-based wallpaper that adds depth, softness, and rich elegance to feature walls and interiors.

points.title: Easy & Clean Installation
points.text: Wallpapers are installed quickly and neatly, without the dust, odor, or post-work mess typically associated with painting.

points.title: Wide Design Selection
points.text: From nature-inspired motifs to modern geometric patterns, wallpapers offer endless design possibilities to define your room’s personality.

points.title: Custom Design Options
points.text: Create a truly personal space with wallpapers customized to your preferred colors, themes, and design inspirations.

points.title: Instant Interior Transformation
points.text: Even a single feature wall in elegant wallpaper can instantly enhance the ambiance and visual appeal of a room.

why.rightTitle: We Help You Choose the Perfect Wallpaper
rightText: From accurate wall measurement to expert installation, AL-Home Decor provides complete guidance to ensure a seamless experience.
Our specialists recommend wallpaper designs that harmonize with your interiors, creating a cohesive and beautifully styled space.

descriptions.short: Elegant wooden floors with enduring appeal.
descriptions.full: Crafted for longevity and style, wooden flooring delivers natural sophistication and lasting performance.
Wooden textures and tones enrich interiors with depth, comfort, and timeless elegance.

products.title: Vinyl Tiles
products.description: Vinyl tiles are cost-effective and durable.

products.title: Carpet Tiles
products.description: Carpet tiles provide comfort and modularity.
